# Descriptive Variable Names Over Abbreviations

## What the User Prefers

Full descriptive names (`userNotificationPreferences`) over abbreviations (`usrNotifPrefs`). Even if longer, readability wins.

## How It Was Learned

Corrected 3 times across separate sessions for using abbreviated variable names.

## When to Apply

- Always, all languages, all contexts
